evidence: 2026-07-11 Asia/Taipei was Saturday after any Friday EOD publication window
annual TWSE holidaySchedule absence only establishes scheduled_calendar_status=scheduled_trading_day, not actual_market_day_status
official TWSE closure announcement confirmed 115/7/10 centralized market full-day closure due to Typhoon Bavi and Taipei City full-day work suspension
official TPEx press release confirmed 115/7/10 OTC securities and derivatives markets closed one day
therefore 2026-07-10 was emergency_closed and the expected latest completed trading date remained 2026-07-09
calendar_evidence.caveat: Runtime must not infer actual trading days from weekday plus annual holidaySchedule alone; dynamic emergency/special-closure sources are required.

dynamic_closure_sources_checked.finding: DGPA result showed northern Taiwan disaster suspension context for the typhoon period; use DGPA/current-history as primary natural-disaster suspension authority in runtime design.
TWSE announced 115/7/10 centralized market full-day closure because Taipei City Government announced all public agencies stopped work due to Typhoon Bavi.
TPEx announced 115/7/10 OTC securities and derivatives markets closed for one day because Taipei City Government announced full-day work suspension due to Typhoon Bavi.
TWSE states that when Taipei City mayor announces all public agencies stop work for the day or morning, the centralized market is closed all day.

currentness_reconciliation_evidence: annual holidaySchedule absence only means 2026-07-10 was scheduled_trading_day
official exchange closure evidence confirms 2026-07-10 emergency_closed due to Typhoon Bavi/Taipei City work suspension
expected latest completed actual trading date at probe time was therefore 2026-07-09
source_reconciliations.runtime_condition: Compute scheduled calendar status and dynamic emergency/special closure status before deriving expected_latest_completed_trade_date.
